feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Publish Data - SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Every time I try to publish my data to SAP Analytics Cloud, this message appears:

Some data modifications cannot be published for one or more reasons, for example limited access rights. If this version is published, the changes will be lost.

How can I solve this problem? Because I have a dimension that has access control, but when the user tries to insert data and publish in the dimension that he has access to, he would have to remain normal and not distribute the input value, as he is doing now.

entry.title: How can I use people scope for one query and only th particular widget but not applied to all others
entry.content:
Hi,

Please help if I can create two different queries and only apply people scope to one query in one report?

I'm trying to build one widget on total headcount and FTE for the whole organisation and another widget to reflect one manager's direct reports headcounts and FTE. I'd like to have these two widgets in one report side by side. The problem is that when I shared the report to the managers, their organisation headcounts widgets turn to report his direct reports headcount as well. It became two widget reporting the same data.

One query is based on User. The field I selected can be accessed by all. The other query is based on Job Info which is RBP restricted to direct reports only.

I would like to de-couple these two queries and widgets. Please help.

Thank you.

Sophia Cheng

entry.title: From where in S4 can I find the SAC values for Rate types like average and closing (currency)?
entry.content:
I'm currently building a model in SAC where data is imported from S4. The dimensions used in the model are Profit Center, Cost Center, GL Account, and Company Code. 

As I need currency conversion in the model, I am wondering if I can obtain directly from the system the SAC type required for the currency conversion such as average or closing. 

For example I know that for GL Account, there is a specific property called SAC Account Type available in an API in S4 so that you can upload the data in SAC with the correct SAC type. Im wondering if there is something similar in terms of currency. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Calculated Measures Subtracting Data from Different Months
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently facing a problem with two Excel files that contain the same measures but yield different results. I want to create a calculated measure that subtracts "dotacoes" for February 2024 (202402) from "dotacoes" for January 2024 (202401). However, I am unable to access the measure "dotacoes" for both February 2024 (202402) and January 2024 (202401) in order to perform this subtraction.

Could you assist me in resolving this issue?

Thanks in advance!

GAnjos

entry.title: how can I change my Change Dimension Type of my own data timestamp in analytic cloud
entry.content:
how to solve this problem?

this is my timestamp format in my csv file

entry.title: SAC/SAP S4/HANA EXCEL EXPORT AND IMPORT
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am having an issue of toughts because it was given to me a database on SAP S4/HANA to export data to an excel and then import to SAC, but all the data is accumulated and they asked me to present by each month and year. First i tried to export each month by itself, but when i get to February the data of that month comes with january too, so that outcome its not possible, so i tried to add and Calculated measure, the idea was "if the date was = to 202402 the measure on the excel of february would subtract to the measure of the excel file of january so i only had the numbers of february, but i tried everything and i couldnt reach an out come by using all the commands of SAC.

If anyone could help me i would eternly gratefull.

Have a blessing day

PS: I will leave here an print of the excel. This excel doesnt have an date registered on it, i know the month because o filter them in SAP before i export.

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Blended Calculation supported by Optimised design experience in the tables?
entry.content:
Hello @laura_vega

Does Blended Calculation supported by Optimised design experience in the tables? 

Could you please confirm on this or any roadmap planned. Your guidance will be of great support. 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Need help adding Live Connection from SAC to S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Cannot add Live connection from S/4Hana Public Cloud
Both SAC and S/4Hana use the same identity provider (IAS)
Already created communication user (which is "SAC_LIVE_USER" in the screenshot)

All configurations follow this instruction

I tried to find a way to configure the InA role in S/4Hana but not found it yet.

Thanks,
Pakorn

entry.title: Rankby Top5 values in a chart usign a script
entry.content:
Dimension: Country
Measure: Total Number

Can you please help me with the syntax as I am facing issue with the code.

Chart_1.rankby("xxx", RankOrder.Top, value:5)

Can you help me with what type of syntax/value I have to replace the "xxx", is it a script variable with type number/string etc. which I have to create or is something else?

Thank you.

entry.title: Restrict Data Import Connecation in SAC
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I would like to bring HR data (Succsess Factors) to the SAC with an import data connection. The HR data is sometimes partially protected and should not be accessible to everyone. Is there a setting in which I can restrict the model creation to certain data connections? For example, that only employees from the HR department can set up a data connection to Success Factors?

Regards Niels

entry.title: SAC Advanced Formula - Conditional Check for Existence of Records Across a Scope in FOREACH Loop
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm working with an advanced formula in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Planning to selectively copy data records based on a condition. The goal is to check if an employee has any record with Datasource = "INPUT" and, if so, to copy that employee's records from Datasource = "BW" to new records under Datasource = "BW_Override". For employees without any INPUT records, no action should be taken.

Here is a simplified structure of my data:

Start MonthEnd MonthDateCost CentreDatasourceGL AccountEmployeeHR AccountFlagFTE
2024072029060000008216BW#7048##1
2024072029060000008216INPUT#7048FORTNIGHTLY_SALARY#0.5
..............................

To achieve this, I'm trying to use a FOREACH loop with an IF condition. My current approach is as follows:

CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = CALENDARYEAR
CONFIG.FLIPPING_SIGN_ACCORDING_ACCTYPE = OFF
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = OFF

// Define the scope for relevant Datasource values
MEMBERSET [d/PLNHR_DATASOURCE] = ("INPUT", "BW", "BW_Override")

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/PLN_EMPLOYEE]
    // Broad-scope check if there's any record with Datasource = INPUT for the current employee
    IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/PLNHR_DATASOURCE] = "INPUT") > 0 THEN
        // Copy records from BW to BW_Override for employees with INPUT records
        DATA([d/PLNHR_DATASOURCE] = "BW_Override", [d/PLN_FLAG] = "X") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/PLNHR_DATASOURCE] = "BW")
    ENDIF
ENDFOR

However, it seems the IF condition is not functioning as expected. I suspect RESULTLOOKUP in the IF statement may be performing a set-wise check rather than aggregating across all records for each employee in the loop, so it fails to correctly detect the presence of Datasource = "INPUT".

My questions:

  1. Is there a way in SAC advanced formulas to check for the existence of records within a scope (e.g., if any record exists with Datasource = "INPUT" for an employee)?
  2. How can I ensure the IF condition only triggers when at least one Datasource = "INPUT" record is found for the employee, rather than checking on a set-wise basis?

Any guidance on structuring this condition or alternatives for achieving the desired result would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

SAP Analytics Cloud for planning SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: "error": "order.download.fail", "message": "Exception when converting HR to internal code "
entry.content:
Hello All,

Getting error during production order download from ECC to SAP DM.

Please advise.! Below is the error

"errorCode": "order.download.fail",
"message": "Exception when converting HR to internal code ",
"messageI18nArguments": [],
"errorLocation": "INTERNAL_SYSTEM_ERROR",
"serviceName": "dme-demand-ms",
"eventType": "sap.dsc.dm.Order.Received.v2"

entry.title: How can we analyzing sql view execution in SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a SQL View in Datasphere and we import the output of this SQL View to an Import Model in SAC. We have done some work on SQL View. After this work, the duration of the related job of this Import Model in SAC has increased a lot. We want to analyze this. Is there a feature similar to Plan Visualizer in Eclipse in Datasphere or Database Explorer?

entry.title: How to create Mandatory Variable at Story level in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create variables at Story level, when the user opens up/refresh the story, he/she has to see the variable prompt with Mandatory and Optional variables to enter values.

When i try to create a variable, i can see the below.

I can create variables at Model level but unable to create a Story Level.

I searched everywhere, but no luck, Could someone please help me?

entry.title: Copy widgets or pages between Stories when using aDatasphere Live Connection
entry.content:
Hello,

I've learned that it is not possible to copy widgets or pages between Stories when using a Datasphere Live Connection.     

Details in this KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3128880 

Here is an Influence request that I have created.  

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/334757 

If this is something that you would find useful, please vote! 

Thank you

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Selected Story Filter value to displayed in the Page
entry.content:
Hi All,

We created Story Filter for one of the Dimension, I have a requirement to display the selected values of the filter to be displayed in the story at the Top Right corner dynamically, Could someone please help me on this?

Example: for the below story, i want to display as :

Selected Plant is : Plant 3 and Plant 4.

entry.title: Ratio in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am trying to create different types of ratios in SAP SAC for CFO of a company.

Ratios are Current ratio, Acid-test ratio, Cash ratio, Debt ratio, Asset turnover ratio, Inventory turnover ratio, Receivables turnover ratio, Return on equity ratio, NPV, ROI.

How can I prepare this ratios? Which data source I need to use to prepare these ratios?

Best Regards

Md Mofty Hossain

entry.title: SAC Publications show successful but users did not receive the emails
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our SAC Publications are not being delivered to users inbox today morning. All the users are SAC recipients, and we have checked the status of all report publications, they show "successful". Anyone else had similar issues today? 

 

Thanks

Srikanth

entry.title: Story Calculations in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Based on user given input in the variable as date, i have display 15year sales data as below

Could someone please give an idea on how can i achieve this?

entry.title: How to delete the leading zero in SAC Dimension from SAP Business Bydesign Datasource?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Hello Everyone,

I'm working on integrating sales orders from an SAP Business ByDesign data source. When refreshing the dimension, data is coming in with leading zeros, even though I set the dimension to an integer in the modeler. Unfortunately, this isn’t trimming the leading zeros as expected. I also tried a script in stories to remove them, but I’m encountering errors. Does anyone know of another way to display the values without leading zeros?

If anyone has faced a similar issue, your advice would be appreciated!

 

Regards

Janarthanan

+919884594169

meetjana@hotmail.com

SAP Analytics Cloud
